title: Capstone: Build the Supervisor System
concept: Assembling a supervisor agent that delegates coding and review tasks to two worker agents; 'Next up: Agent Frameworks & Design Patterns.'.

exercises.prompt: What is used to trace issues in multi-agent communication?
exercises.explain: Central trace logs help us identify where communication problems happen between agents.

cards.title: Building a Supervisor Agent
cards.body: A Supervisor Agent manages other agents, like a project manager. It assigns tasks and checks their work.

cards.title: Supervisor Agent
cards.body: A Supervisor Agent is responsible for directing other agents and ensuring tasks are completed efficiently.

cards.title: Project Management Analogy
cards.body: Think of the Supervisor Agent like a coach who assigns players (workers) different drills (tasks) to improve team performance.

cards.title: Example of Task Delegation
cards.body: The Supervisor might say, 'Worker Agent A, code the new feature, and Worker Agent B, review the code for errors.'

cards.title: Myth: Supervisors Control Everything
cards.body: Many think supervisors do all the work, but they actually enable others to succeed by distributing tasks.

cards.title: Structure of a Supervisory System
cards.body: A clear structure helps in delegation of tasks and maintaining productivity.

right.text: <Worker Agents> Complete tasks assigned by the supervisor.

exercises.prompt: What does a Supervisor Agent do?
exercises.explain: A Supervisor Agent delegates tasks to other agents instead of doing everything by itself.

exercises.prompt: A Supervisor Agent does all the work for the worker agents. (True/False)
exercises.explain: A Supervisor Agent delegates work, enabling worker agents to perform their tasks.

exercises.prompt: The Supervisor Agent assigns tasks while the worker agents ____ them.
exercises.sentence: The Supervisor Agent assigns tasks while the worker agents complete them.
exercises.explain: The word 'complete them' describes what worker agents do with the tasks assigned by the Supervisor Agent.

exercises.prompt: Which of the following tasks does a Supervisor Agent do?

options.text: Assign coding tasks and review work

exercises.explain: The Supervisor Agent's role is to assign coding tasks and review the worker agents' work.

exercises.prompt: What are the key responsibilities of a Supervisor Agent when building a multi-agent system?

options.text: Assembling components and controlling all decisions
Delegating tasks and ensuring code reviews are completed

exercises.explain: The key responsibilities include delegating specific tasks to worker agents and verifying that their work adheres to standards.
